description_long: This is a medium-sized, rectangular briefcase with a matte, dark gray exterior and a structured form. The main body is constructed from what appears to be leather or a synthetic leather-like material, with a single top handle that is padded and fixed, as well as a detachable, adjustable shoulder strap attached with gold-colored metal hardware. The front features a central flap secured by a prominent gold buckle, while the back has a flat, stitched-on pocket without a visible closure. The sides are smooth, with metal D-rings for the strap attachments, and there are no visible corner reinforcements or decorative elements. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for carrying documents or a laptop in an urban environment.
description: A structured, dark gray briefcase with a padded top handle, gold buckle closure, and detachable shoulder strap. Minimalist design with a rear pocket and gold hardware.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main flap with a gold buckle closure and the padded top handle.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the attachment point for the shoulder strap and the thickness of the briefcase.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a flat, stitched-on pocket and the full length of the shoulder strap.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite strap attachment and the smooth, unadorned side panel.
attribute_handle_type: One fixed, padded, rectangular top handle made of leather or synthetic leather, stitched to the top of the briefcase; one detachable, adjustable shoulder strap made of matching material with metal clips.
attribute_lock_mechanism: Single front buckle closure made of gold-colored metal, located centrally on the front flap.
attribute_external_pockets: One flat, stitched-on pocket on the rear side, no visible closure.
